channel.title: flove making-of — ux questions
channel.description: New ux design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: What is the flove approach to error handling?
item.description:
• Graceful degradation — App continues working with reduced functionality. Best UX. • Error page — Show a friendly error message. Clear, but interrupts flow. • Silent failure — Fail silently, log to console. Minimal user impact, hard to debug. • Inline error states — Show error within the relevant UI component. Contextual, non-disruptive.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: Graceful degradation
